title: Build the content schema validator and Def compiler spike
summary: Validate JSON5 source content, namespace IDs, references, patch ordering and localization keys, then compile a small immutable runtime catalog.
acceptance: Invalid IDs, duplicate IDs, missing references and localization keys fail with source locations
Sample anomaly and incident content compile without custom runtime code
Patch conflicts are reported rather than silently accepted

history.details: Added structured content validation and compiler spike; required checks pass.

changes_requested: High: patch-applied references/localization are not revalidated and can compile missing refs or throw TypeError; Medium: invalid/unknown patch changes and JSON5 files are silently accepted or ignored.

Fixed reviewer-requested regressions in WM-0009: patch application now revalidates references/localization after cloning and patching, patch field shape/type issues now emit structured diagnostics with source locations, and JSON5 fixture sources are parsed or explicitly rejected instead of being silently ignored. Re-ran content validation, content tests, compile smoke, typecheck, lint, format, boundaries, and diff checks.

review.summary: High: patch-applied references/localization are not revalidated and can compile missing refs or throw TypeError; Medium: invalid/unknown patch changes and JSON5 files are silently accepted or ignored.
